---
title: "The Rev. Dr. Richard Frederick Littledale"
---

## The Rev. Dr. Richard Frederick Littledale

**Dates:** (1833-1890)

### Description

theologian

### Biography

The DNB commented on his 'tenacious memory and wide range of reading'.

### Letters

- Letter from April 4 th [1876?]
- Letter from Oct 24th 1863

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
